name: golang-github-azure-azure-pipeline-go-dev
title: golang-github-azure-azure-pipeline-go-dev
description:
HTTP request/response middleware pipeline
Package pipeline implements an HTTP request/response middleware pipeline whose
policy objects mutate an HTTP request's URL, query parameters, and/or headers
before the request is sent over the wire.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-azure-azure-pipeline-go-dev because HTTP request/response middleware pipeline.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-azure-azure-pipeline-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-azure-azure-pipeline-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-azure-azure-pipeline-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
